title: Happy 60th Birthday Party Banner Age 60 Giant Extra Wide Decoration Garland Bright Colourful Multicolour Unisex Recyclable Eco Friendly Holographic Shiny Sparkly Party Banner
features: Thank you for looking at our banner. This extra Large 60th Birthday banner features a bold modern print design with a subtle shine that is a perfect decoration to hang across walls, around tables, doors, staircases to name but a few places.

Our holographic banners are 2.6m long, they can be used as one long banner, or split into 3 smaller banners as the pattern repeats. This banners is double the width of a normal party banner, making this banner a HUGE statement piece which is sure to catch your guests eye! Each pack contains one banner, no assembly required.

Please dispose of party banners responsibly. To recycle foil party banners, first remove any non-recyclable elements like plastic or tape. Clean the foil by wiping off any residue, and then pop them in you metal and plastics bin.

We'd recommend using blu tak or sticky tape to hang the banners, they are folded to pack them. Be sure to pull them nice and tight as this allows creases to dissapear and it let the banner sparkle and shine as much as possible!
Our range is suitable for girls, boys, women, men, . They can be used both indoors and outdoors, and are reusable with long lasting colours.

Wall banners are an essential addition to any birthday party, and this large and colourful foil wall banner is perfect for adding extra excitement to the occasion! This extra long party banner can be used as one complete length, or can be separated along the perforations in to three identical sections measuring approximately 84cm each.

Please Note: Keep away from young children due to potential strangulation hazard. Plastic bags can be dangerous, to avoid danger of suffocation, keep these bags away from children under 36 months. This packaging contains metal staples, please dispose of safely.
Don't forget that banners can be stored and kept as a keep sake or put in a memory box. This is a particularily good idea for poignant birthdays and events.

THANK YOU FOR SHOPPING WITH A UK BASED FAMILY BUSINESS, thank you for supporting us.If you need any help, or party advice, please get in touch, we’d be happy to help. Your items may vary slightly from the image, this can be due to screen resolution, or manufacturer changes,but we will always ensure your items match, so please don’t worry!
